title: [v5.4-rhel] CVE-2025-47913 x/crypto
body:
Bump golang.org/x/cyrpto to v0.43.0 to solve
CVE-2025-47913

And ugh, Yet another Go bump.

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-66017, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-134791, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-134776

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v5.4-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Probably need to build the build tests to a newer Fedora
@mheon, is that on the Buildah side in .currus.yml, or is it pulling it locally?
Local Cirrus in the Podman repo
@lsm5 @luap99, I think my IMAGE_SUFFIX in the .cirrus.yml file is off here.  Any pointers on where to find an updated one?
That shouild work @mheon.  Regardless, I'd like to know where that suffix resides.

The VM images are build out of https://github.com/containers/automation_images/
The image suffix is there committed as file https://github.com/containers/automation_images/blob/main/IMG_SFX
